title: Easy With Marinda – Michele Steyn
excerpt: Michele Steyn is one of the gentlest, sweetest people I know. It's simply lovely to be in her company. She works on the production team that makes Easy with Marinda. So I assumed that if she works on a food show and has a mother who cooks fantastically, she'd be able to cook too …

seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Michele Steyn - Marinda Kook

html:
Michele Steyn is one of the gentlest, sweetest people I know. It's simply lovely to be in her company. She works on the production team that makes Easy with Marinda . So I assumed that if she works on a food show and has a mother who cooks fantastically, she'd be able to cook too. Turns out not…

In the course of one of our conversations, I found out she's wary of working with large cuts of meat. And right there I asked her to come hang out with me in my kitchen. Big pieces of meat were cooked and fears were buried. I've since spoken to her, and she says she cooks now!

Tune in Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 for this special episode.
